## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt --all`.
- [ ] I ran `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`.
- [ ] I ran `cargo test --all`.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md where needed.
- [ ] I verified behavior on my target platform.
